label: World Cup finals
definition: Matches in the FIFA World Cup final tournament

label: World Cup qualification
definition: Matches in confederation or inter-confederation qualification for a FIFA World Cup

label: Continental championship finals
definition: Final tournaments for senior national-team continental championships

label: Continental championship qualification
definition: Qualifying matches for a continental senior championship

label: Intercontinental championship finals
definition: Senior national-team competitions or one-match finals between continental champions
examples: FIFA Confederations Cup; Finalissima; Artemio Franchi Cup

label: Continental Nations League
definition: League-format senior national-team competitions organized by a continental confederation

label: Olympic
definition: Olympic and Olympic-qualification matches

label: National-team friendlies
definition: National-team matches described by the source as friendly or without a competition label

label: Other national-team matches
definition: National-team matches that do not fit another selectable family

label: Tournament finals — unallocated
definition: Calendar-year aggregate that the source calls Tournament but does not split by named competition

label: Qualification — unallocated
definition: Calendar-year aggregate that the source calls Qualifiers but does not split World Cup from continental qualification

label: Competitive — unallocated
definition: Calendar-year competitive aggregate that cannot be assigned to a named competition family

label: All national-team matches — unallocated
definition: Calendar-year total with no competitive or friendly split

label: National league
definition: National pyramid league and its source-defined championship or postseason
examples: La Liga; Serie A; Brasileirão; NASL

label: Continental federation cup
definition: Club competition organized within one continental confederation

label: Intercontinental federation cup
definition: Club competition between teams from multiple continental confederations
examples: Intercontinental Cup; FIFA Club World Cup

label: Regional league
definition: Subnational or multi-state league competition

label: Domestic cup
definition: National knockout cup grouped under the user's all-other club bucket

label: Domestic super cup
definition: Domestic super cup or shield grouped under the user's all-other club bucket

label: All other club goals
definition: Club matches not assigned to the four named club families

label: Unclassified club
definition: Source bucket awaiting classification

label: Club competition aggregate — unallocated
definition: Multi-year club aggregate that overlaps finer competition records and must be used only as a selected source variant

label: Representative or select team
definition: Army state league or invitational representative teams outside the club and senior-national-team contexts
examples: Army teams; São Paulo selection; other selects
